note: Dollar PnL = if you had copied each resolved trade in the window at the size given, paid wallet.avg_buy_price + retail slippage, sum of (1/fill - 1) on wins minus 1 on losses. Slippage = max(0, wallet_avg_realized_slippage_cents) + 1¢ retail-cross adjustment, capped at 25¢. Trades where slippage pushes fill above $1 are skipped (mathematically uncopyable).
